app.name: DailyLogic
app.heroDescription: Practical tools for budgeting, cooking, shopping, and everyday decisions — everything runs locally in your browser.
app.footer: All tools run locally in your browser.
app.metaDescription: Focused tools for life, home, and personal management — all in your browser.

dashboard.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, category, or tag…
dashboard.noToolsHint: Try a different name or category.
dashboard.favoritesDescription: Quick access to the tools you use most

recent.title: Recent Calculations
recent.description: Pick up where you left off

budget-simple.name: Budget Planner
budget-simple.description: Strategic monthly plan with gap analysis and user-driven trade-offs.

time-value.name: Delegate or Do
time-value.description: Decision matrix for DIY vs hiring a professional.

tip-split.name: Smart Tip Assistant
tip-split.description: Context-aware tip suggestions and bill splitting.

recipe-adjuster.name: Recipe Scaler
recipe-adjuster.description: Scale your recipes up or down instantly.

unit-compare.name: Smart Shopping Assistant
unit-compare.description: Compare multiple brands by unit price and build your shopping list.

notFound.title: Tool not found
notFound.description: This tool doesn't exist in the registry.

content.relatedToolsDescription: Free, browser-based tools that complement this guide.
content.blogDescription: Short, actionable guides — with links to the free tools that help you put them into practice.

landing.useCasesTitle: Learn how to get the most from this tool
landing.useCasesDescription: Practical guides and everyday scenarios that pair well with {{title}}.
landing.readyDescription: Jump straight into the live {{toolName}} — your inputs stay in your browser.
landing.toolsIndexDescription: Clear, focused guides for each tool — what it does, when to use it, and how to get started.

consent.caption: Privacy
consent.title: Cookies & analytics
consent.description: DailyLogic uses cookies and analytics (Google Analytics) to understand how visitors use the site and to support advertising through Google AdSense. Your tool inputs always stay in your browser. Please accept to continue using the site.
